_comment: Provider pricing-source registry (Block H / T35). The authoritative pages to VERIFY the catalog's indicative prices against — URLs only, no prices. Categorized and cross-linked to the catalog vendor key (`catalogVendor`) where the provider's models are in the catalog; null means not yet represented. Hand-curated + review-gated. Keep `apiPricingUrl` = the developer/per-token/usage pricing page; `consumerPlansUrl` = the flat consumer subscription page when one exists (mirrors plans.json).
disclaimer: Official vendor pricing pages, for verification. The catalog's own per-model prices are INDICATIVE US list references — always confirm against the vendor page linked here before relying on a figure.

providers.name: Google (Gemini API)
providers.note: Gemini API via Google AI Studio.

providers.name: Z.ai / Zhipu AI
providers.note: Open-platform (bigmodel.cn) developer pricing; GLM Coding Plan is the consumer subscription.

providers.name: Alibaba Cloud (Qwen via Model Studio)
providers.note: Qwen models via Model Studio / DashScope.

providers.name: Azure AI Foundry
providers.note: Re-serves OpenAI and other models; a curated set is in the catalog.

providers.name: Groq
providers.note: Fast serverless inference of open models.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.note: Gateway re-serving many vendors' models; only a small curated sample is in the catalog. Price is tabled per-model in its own catalog.

providers.name: Vercel AI SDK / Gateway
providers.note: Cloud/edge usage gateway over many models; only a small curated sample is in the catalog.
